summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.Orchestrator; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors.pages.PeerReviewPage; public class PeerReviewPageFactory { public static PeerReviewPage createPeerReviewPage(MultiPageEditor editor, Orchestrator orchestrator) { PeerReviewPage page = new PeerReviewPage(editor.getContainer(), editor, orchestrator); int index = editor.addPage(page); editor.setPageText(index, "Peer Review"); return page; } }
